violations.text: Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
Employee was wearing clothing soiled with food debris. Employee changed his shirt during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
